title: Nightvision Enchantment
description: A nightvision enchantment for exploring and building
body:
A enchantment for helmets that gives you the nightvision effect if you wear the helmet.

You can use this enchantment for exploring caves, the nether, the night and for building.

 

If you need a server:
[![A Picture of my Partner Kinetic Hosting, where you can get a Server with 15% off in the first month with the Code "BluePhi09"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f349007e304fe6e9495e0459d3443d4d39cb477d_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=263)
